benefits.description: Belt in 3-4 notches, skinny clothes almost fit, obvious visual difference. Expects to be as thin as in 20 years after ~1 more month.
Increased energy level, more active without needing willpower

protocol_notes: Started at 2mg/week for 1 month, moved to 4mg/week. Reconstitution: 1ml per 10mg vial so 1 calibration unit = 1mg on insulin syringe. Notes that 8mg/wk drops weight twice as fast but may reduce muscle mass. Currently 2.5 months in. Did not weigh himself at start, no scale.
